title: NavLink
description: Create a navigation menu using NavLink elements to navigate between routes.
problemStatement:
Stay on the page! Create a `Navigation` component with two links (`/` and `/about`) using the `NavLink` component from `react-router-dom`.

**Requirement:** Use `NavLink` instead of plain `<a>` tags to prevent full page reloads.
hints: `NavLink` automatically adds an 'active' class to the link matching the current URL.
expectedOutput: A nav menu that changes the browser URL without refreshing the page
